title: TLauncher Tears
description: The ultimate 'buy the game bro' bouncer that blocks fake accounts, protects your server, and feeds on pirate tears.
body:
Stop sending garbage to the server.

This mod is very simple. It checks if you actually own the game. If you don't, it simply kills the connection before a single packet even leaves The client.

How it works? It doesn't send packets if you aren't logged in. That's it. Don't ask questions. Buy the game or stay in the main menu.

✔ Support & Origins
This mod was specifically developed for the Werewolves vs Vampires modpack to ensure a 24/7 lag-free experience.

Check out my other projects: CurseForge - epicskydex

Support the Developer: Support me on Ko-fi
